mainEntity.name: Is Google Assistant optimization different from regular SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you are choosing between SEO services, voice search optimization, and local SEO, local SEO is often the foundation and Google Assistant optimization is the layer on top. If your service area is competitive, you usually need all three working together.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Regular SEO builds visibility, local SEO supports nearby searches, and Google Assistant optimization focuses on content Google can read aloud or quote easily.
